sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Fermented soybean paste is a fermented food whose essential ingredient is soybean. The product is a paste type which has various physical properties such as semi-solid and partly retained shape of soybean and which is manufactured from the ingredients stipulated in Sections 3.1.1 and 3.1.2 through the following processes: a) boiled or steamed soybeans, or the mixture of boiled or steamed soybeans and grains, are fermented with naturally occurring or cultivated microorganisms; b) mixed with salt or brine and others; c) the mixture or solid part of the mixture shall be aged for a certain period of time until the quality of the product meets the requirements stipulated in Section 3.2 Quality factors; and d) processed by heat or other appropriate means, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.

sections.title: Minimum fill
sections.text: The container should be well filled with the product which should occupy not less than 90 percent (minus any necessary head space according to good manufacturing practices) of the water capacity of the container. The water capacity of the container is the value of distilled water at 20 ºC which the sealed container will hold when completely filled. Taking into account various characteristics of the products, minimum fill may not be applied to some types of products.

sentences.original: Fermented soybean paste is a fermented food whose essential ingredient is soybean.

prefilter.reason: contains normative lexical cues

classification.sentence: The product is a paste type which has various physical properties such as semi-solid and partly retained shape of soybean and which is manufactured from the ingredients stipulated in Sections 3.1.1 and 3.1.2 through the following processes: a) boiled or steamed soybeans, or the mixture of boiled or steamed soybeans and grains, are fermented with naturally occurring or cultivated microorganisms; b) mixed with salt or brine and others; c) the mixture or solid part of the mixture shall be aged for a certain period of time until the quality of the product meets the requirements stipulated in Section 3.2 Quality factors; and d) processed by heat or other appropriate means, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.
classification.function: Describing product properties and mandatory manufacturing steps
classification.pattern: Complex declarative with enumeration of mandatory processing steps and product properties

components.physical_properties: semi-solid and partly retained shape of soybean
process_steps: a) fermentation of boiled or steamed soybeans or mixtures with microorganisms
b) mixing with salt or brine and others
c) aging mixture until quality meets Section 3.2
d) heat or other processing before/after sealing to prevent spoilage

classification.justification: No existing template captures detailed multi-step manufacturing obligation combined with product physical description; hence new pattern.

pages.title: REGIONAL STANDARD FOR FERMENTED SOYBEAN PASTE
pages.summary: Página inicial do documento com título principal e cabeçalho, sem estrutura de seções ou texto interno para mapear.
Página 2 contém cabeçalho repetitivo e texto introdutório sem títulos estruturais detectados. Não há seções ou subseções para mapear, texto é um parágrafo simples explicativo.

Página 3 com 3 seções principais e 9 subseções estruturadas. Os títulos seguem numeração hierárquica clara. Textos associados foram devidamente agrupados sob cada nó. Não há continuidade com outras páginas detectada.

Página com 2 seções principais numeradas (3.3, 3.4) e a seção 4 com cinco subseções (4.1 a 4.5). A hierarquia está clara e o texto interno foi corretamente associado a cada nó. Não há sinais de continuidade entre páginas nesta página.

Página com seções principais numeradas de 4.6 a 8.2, contendo textos associados a cada título e subtítulo claramente identificados. Não há sinais de continuidade entre páginas. Cabeçalho reduzido com código e número da página.

A página apresenta a continuação da seção 8.3 com texto completo, seguida pela seção 9 METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING com seus subtítulos numerados e respectivos textos. A seção NOTES contém diversas referências citadas no texto. Não há continuidade indicativa entre páginas.
